CALL FROM DEFT. MORSE THAT THEY WANT TO GO TO BINDING ARB IN ORDER NOT TO APPEAR AT STATUS/SETTLE CONF ON 4/28. JUDGE DESMOND SAID OK BUT THEY MUST SEND IN A STIPULATION TO BINDI NG ARB SETTING THE APPROX ARB DATE SO THE COURT CAN CONTINUE STATUS CONF FOR A LATER DATE AND KEEP TRACK OF CASE. DEFT. MORSE AGREED AND WILL CONTACT EACH PARTY AND ABIDE BY JUDGES DECISION.
